# Security Policy

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please report security issues privately to **elfege@elfege.com** rather than
opening a public issue. Include:

- A description of the vulnerability.
- Steps to reproduce (PoC if available).
- The affected version(s) — see `git tag -l 'v*.*.*'` or the latest
  GitHub Release.

You should receive an acknowledgement within a few business days. Once a
patch is available, a coordinated disclosure plan will be agreed upon
before any public mention.

## Supported versions

Only the latest `vMAJOR.MINOR.PATCH` release is actively patched. Older
versions remain in `git tag -l` history but receive no security backports.

## Scope

This project is a personal NVR system released under BSL 1.1
(see `LICENSE`). Reports about misuse of the BSL change-date provisions
or licensing questions should be sent to the same address.
